stratagem.name: ARMOUR OF CONTEMPT
stratagem.lore: The belligerence of the Adeptus Astartes combined with their post‑human physiology makes them unyielding foes to face.
stratagem.when: Your opponent’s Shooting phase or the Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
stratagem.target: One Adeptus Astartes unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.
stratagem.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time an attack targets your unit, worsen the Armour Penetration characteristic of that attack by 1.

stratagem.name: RUTHLESS BUTCHERY
stratagem.lore: The Iron Hands elite kill with machine‑like relentlessness, and the tempo of slaughter only increases if they have losses of their own to avenge.
stratagem.when: Your Shooting phase or the Fight phase.
stratagem.target: One Adeptus Astartes Dreadnought , Terminator , Bladeguard Veteran Squad , Sternguard Veteran Squad or Vanguard Veteran Squad unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot or fight this phase.
stratagem.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes an attack, add 1 to the Hit roll. If your unit is below Starting Strength, add 1 to the Wound roll as well.

stratagem.name: DOMINATOR BEACON
stratagem.lore: These custom‑built servo‑skulls detach from augmetic tethers as the Iron Hands pass, settling into sentry patterns around vital strategic sites.
stratagem.target: One Adeptus Astartes Dreadnought, Terminator, Bladeguard Veteran Squad, Sternguard Veteran Squad or Vanguard Veteran Squad unit from your army within range of an objective marker you control.
stratagem.effect: That objective marker remains under your control, even if you have no models within range of it, until your opponent controls it at the end of a phase.

stratagem.name: COGITATED FEROCITY
stratagem.lore: Running endless up‑to‑the‑second cogitations of their foes’ weak spots and vulnerabilities, Avernii veterans place every blow with punishing precision.
stratagem.target: One Adeptus Astartes Dreadnought , Terminator , Bladeguard Veteran Squad, Sternguard Veteran Squad or Vanguard Veteran Squad unit from your army that has not been selected to fight this phase.
stratagem.effect: Select either the [SUSTAINED HITS 1] or [LETHAL HITS] abilities. Until the end of the phase, melee weapons equipped by models in your unit have the selected ability.

stratagem.name: AUGMETIC FORTITUDE
stratagem.lore: Gene‑wrought flesh reinforced by hardened augmetics and adamantine armour, the warriors of Clan Company Avernii exhibit nigh‑supernatural resilience.
stratagem.when: Your opponent’s Charge phase, just after an enemy unit ends a Charge move.
stratagem.target: One Adeptus Astartes Terminator , Bladeguard Veteran Squad , Sternguard Veteran Squad or Vanguard Veteran Squad unit from your army within Engagement Range of that enemy unit.
stratagem.effect: Until the end of the turn, each time an attack is allocated to a model in your unit, subtract 1 from the Damage characteristic of that attack.

stratagem.name: DROPSHIP EXTRACTION
stratagem.lore: Terminators withdraw from the fight during a lull, board airborne transports and prepare their next assault.
stratagem.when: End of your opponent’s Fight phase.
stratagem.target: One Adeptus Astartes Terminator unit from your army. You cannot target a unit that is within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units.
stratagem.effect: Remove your unit from the battlefield and place it into Strategic Reserves.
